objective: Complete issue #23 by validating the MVP raw, normalized, snapshot, and Dagster data path on the exact TOPT medium denominator.
claim_ceiling: E3 representative Local/CI TOPT data-plane candidate; no live-source, Staging, factor, strategy, or release claim

requirements: accepted D1 handoff remains byte-identical and authorizes this batch
base_sha updated to the current implementation PR base commit
D2 corpus paths and SHA-256 frozen before execution
reviewer assigned and different from the implementation owner
E0 and E1 remain batch-private; an integration lease is required before the first shared MVP path, migration 0021, or SQL contract change
GitHub issue body contains this manifest path and exact SHA-256
Delivery Governance CI passes offline validation and live GitHub parity

dependencies.artifact: accepted D1 normalized filing, capture, snapshot, and runner handoff

later_claim_dependencies: D1 producer evidence already pins the accepted #57/#58 contract tree; any contract-tree change reruns D2
#59 accepted research and headcount semantics before downstream semantic freeze
#60 accepted live source, model, rights, and budget policy before any live call
#61 accepted applicability and SLO denominator before readiness acceptance
#70 consumes the complete #23 path before it freezes its E3 headcount candidate
#24, #25, #71, and #26 accept the Core factor and Local strategy candidate before #27
#27 owns the bounded real-source Staging execution

required_strata: one exact TOPT NVDA price success from immutable raw bytes
missing confidence, identity, lineage, or PIT timestamp
malformed, non-Decimal, or internally inconsistent OHLCV bar
wrong issuer, security, listing, or share class
identical retry and changed source-byte vintage
split and dividend timing without adjusted-price double counting
financial fact and filing restatement timing

source_ceiling: Checked-in public fixtures only through E3. Live calls remain owned by #60 and #27.

requirements: no default Definitions, registry entry, schedule, source call, or route
E0 and E1 remain explicit Local/CI test composition only
accepted ReleaseManifest registry and configuration hashes exclude D2
negative test rejects release, Staging, live-source, and unlisted-consumer activation

negative_controls: wrong or revoked D1 handoff identity
missing identity, confidence, raw lineage, registry, policy, or PIT timestamp
future-known or stale price, fact, filing, action, or membership record
wrong issuer, security, listing, or share class
float or malformed monetary input and adjusted-action double counting
UPDATE or DELETE against raw or normalized vintages
source or semantic schema drift and central source/type branching
factor-visible source, raw, registry, or lineage provenance
denominator shrink, duplicate required cell, release activation, or Staging activation

output.retention: accepted E2 handoff and terminal E3 evidence are permanent; failed rung evidence follows CI retention

invalidation: D1 handoff, TOPT denominator, corpus bytes, registry, schema, PIT policy, confidence rule, or migration change creates a new revision
shared-toolkit finding invalidates the current rung and reruns the exact corpus
denominator or required-strata shrink creates a reviewed prospective revision and cannot repair prior evidence
handoff consumer or environment permission change creates a new handoff
revocation preserves prior evidence and blocks new activation
rollback: Revert only the latest D2 rung PR and revoke any produced handoff; immutable D1 evidence and append-only raw and normalized vintages are never deleted.
